steps.title: Use the required examples
steps.content: The sentence needs examples of countries where the number of women on highest courts decreased or stayed unchanged from 2009 to 2013. A country whose number increased does not complete the contrast.

steps.title: Compare the countries
steps.content: Choice A includes Slovenia, which increased, along with the Dominican Republic. Choice B also includes Slovenia's increase, so it does not fit. Choice C discusses Finland staying the same but shifts to a 2013 comparison with other countries. The needed pair is a decrease in the Dominican Republic and no change in Finland. The answer is D.
